description: MCP servers configured in ~/.claude.json — these provide tool access to Claude Code agents

gitnexus.purpose: Code intelligence knowledge graph — indexes repos into graph DB, exposes 16 MCP tools for dependency analysis, blast radius, symbol context, and Cypher queries
gitnexus.setup: gitnexus analyze ~/aeon && gitnexus analyze ~/paperclip && gitnexus analyze ~/aeon/dashboard

qmd.purpose: Local semantic search engine — hybrid BM25 + vector search over markdown collections
qmd.setup: qmd collection add vault ~/vault && qmd embed

restore_note: Copy the servers object into ~/.claude.json under 'mcpServers' key. Paths are Windows-specific.
